// Compile this with: rustc --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -O --crate-type=cdylib lib.rs

#[no_mangle]
pub extern "C" fn fusion_entry() -> i32 {
    // Logic goes here. 
    // Return 0 for success, 1 for error.
    
    // In v2.1 we will add host function calls here to log data back to Core.
    0
}
